title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
summary: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.
title_es: Google invierte $40B en Anthropic para asegurar capacidad de cómputo
bajada: Google anunció una inversión de hasta $40 mil millones en Anthropic en efectivo y capacidad computacional, marcando un movimiento estratégico en la carrera por asegurar recursos de IA. Esta inversión responde a la necesidad de las grandes empresas de tech de garantizar acceso a infraestructura para entrenar modelos cada vez más potentes.
bajada_en: Google announced an investment of up to $40 billion in Anthropic through cash and compute capacity, marking a strategic move in the race to secure AI resources. This investment reflects the growing need for tech giants to guarantee access to infrastructure for training increasingly powerful models.

title: China’s DeepSeek previews new AI model a year after jolting US rivals
summary: Chinese AI company DeepSeek released a preview of its hotly anticipated next-generation AI model V4 on Friday, saying that the open-source model can compete with leading closed-source systems from US rivals including Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI. DeepSeek says V4 marks a major improvement over prior models, especially in coding, a capability that has become central […]
title_es: DeepSeek presenta V4, modelo open-source competitivo con rivales estadounidenses
bajada: DeepSeek lanzó una preview de su modelo V4, el cual asegura que puede competir con sistemas de Anthropic, Google y OpenAI. El modelo mejora significativamente en capacidades de programación y procesamiento de prompts más largos, manteniendo la filosofía open-source que caracteriza a la empresa.
bajada_en: DeepSeek released a preview of its V4 model, claiming it can compete with systems from Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI. The model significantly improves coding capabilities and longer prompt handling while maintaining DeepSeek's open-source philosophy.

title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro in the API
summary: GPT-5.5-https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47879092- April 2026 (1010 comments)Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47894000Points: 249# Comments: 138
title_es: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.5 y GPT-5.5 Pro en su API
bajada: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro through its API, expanding access to the latest generation of its models. La noticia genera considerable interés en la comunidad de developers según actividad en Hacker News.
bajada_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro through its API, expanding developer access to the latest generation models. The announcement generated significant community interest and discussion.

title: AI-Designed Drugs by a DeepMind Spinoff Are Headed to Human Trials
summary: Isomorphic Labs president Max Jaderberg said at WIRED Health in London that the startup has built a “broad and exciting pipeline of new medicines.”
title_es: Medicamentos diseñados por IA de DeepMind avanzan a ensayos humanos
bajada: Isomorphic Labs, spinoff de DeepMind, anunció que medicamentos diseñados usando IA avanzan hacia ensayos clínicos en humanos. El hito demuestra el potencial práctico de la IA en drug discovery y acelera la viabilidad comercial de esta aplicación.
bajada_en: Isomorphic Labs, a DeepMind spinoff, announced that AI-designed drugs are advancing to human clinical trials. The milestone demonstrates practical AI impact in drug discovery and commercial viability.

title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
summary: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.
title_es: ComfyUI alcanza valuación de $500M tras recaudar $30M
bajada: ComfyUI, plataforma que ofrece mayor control sobre generación de imágenes, videos y audio con IA, alcanzó una valuación de $500 millones después de recaudar $30 millones. El movimiento refleja la demanda creciente de herramientas que empoderen a creadores en la generación de contenido con IA.
bajada_en: ComfyUI reached a $500 million valuation after raising $30 million, driven by creator demand for more control over AI-generated media. The funding reflects growing interest in tools that empower creators in the AI generation space.

title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
summary: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. Like DeepSeek’s previous models, V4 is open source, meaning it is available…
title_es: Por qué el modelo V4 de DeepSeek es importante para la industria
bajada: MIT Technology Review analiza tres razones clave por las que el modelo V4 de DeepSeek marca un hito: procesamiento de prompts mucho más largos gracias a nuevo diseño eficiente y disponibilidad open-source. El lanzamiento refuerza la competencia global en desarrollo de modelos de IA.
bajada_en: MIT Technology Review outlines three reasons why DeepSeek's V4 matters: significantly longer prompt processing through efficient design and open-source availability. The release reinforces global competition in AI model development.

title: Discord Sleuths Gained Unauthorized Access to Anthropic’s Mythos
summary: Plus: Spy firms tap into a global telecom weakness to track targets, 500,000 UK health records go up for sale on Alibaba, Apple patches a revealing notification bug, and more.
title_es: Usuarios de Discord accedieron sin autorización al modelo Mythos de Anthropic
bajada: Investigadores descubrieron un incidente de seguridad donde usuarios de Discord ganaron acceso no autorizado al modelo Mythos de Anthropic durante su fase limitada de lanzamiento. El incidente subraya los desafíos de seguridad en releases tempranas de modelos poderosos.
bajada_en: Security researchers discovered unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos model through Discord during its limited release phase. The incident highlights security challenges in early-stage releases of powerful models.

title: Apr 24, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic and NEC collaborate to build Japan’s largest AI engineering workforce
summary: Announcements Anthropic and NEC collaborate to build Japan’s largest AI engineering workforce Apr 24, 2026 NEC Corporation will use Claude as it builds one of Japan’s largest AI-native engineering organizations, making it available to approximately 30,000 NEC Group employees worldwide. As part of this strategic collaboration, NEC will become Anthropic’s first Japan-based global partner. Together, we will develop secure, industry-specific AI products for the Japanese market, starting with tools for finance, manufacturing, and local government. “This long-term partnership with Anthropic enables NEC to maximize the potential of AI in the Japanese market,” said Toshifumi Yoshizaki, Executive Officer and COO of NEC Corporation. “Together, we aim to create solutions that meet the high safety, reliability, and quality standards demanded by companies and public administration in Japan.” Claude for NEC’s customers NEC and Anthropic will jointly develop secure, domain-specific AI products for Japanese customers in sectors like finance, manufacturing, and cybersecurity. In addition, NEC is already integrating Claude into its Security Operations Center services to help defend customers against increasingly sophisticated cybersecurity threats. Claude will also be integrated into the next-generation cybersecurity service NEC is currently providing. Claude, including Claude Opus 4.7, and Claude Code will be incorporated into NEC BluStellar Scenario , a program that provides consulting, AI tools, security, and digital infrastructure to businesses, starting with its offerings for data-driven management and customer experience, and gradually expanding to others. How NEC will use Claude internally Internally, NEC will establish a Center of Excellence to develop a highly skilled, AI-enabled engineering organization, supported by technical enablement and training from Anthropic. NEC aims to build one of Japan’s largest AI-native engineering teams, who will use Claude Code in their work.
title_es: Anthropic y NEC colaboran para entrenar 30K empleados en IA en Japón
bajada: Anthropic anunció una colaboración estratégica con NEC Corporation para integrar Claude en aproximadamente 30,000 empleados del grupo NEC. NEC se convierte en el primer partner global de Anthropic en Japón, desarrollando productos seguros específicos para finanzas, manufactura y gobierno local.
bajada_en: Anthropic announced a strategic partnership with NEC Corporation to deploy Claude across approximately 30,000 NEC Group employees worldwide. NEC becomes Anthropic's first Japan-based global partner, developing secure industry-specific solutions.

title: huggingface /ml-intern
summary:
ML Intern An ML intern that autonomously researches, writes, and ships good quality ML releated code using the Hugging Face ecosystem — with deep access to docs, papers, datasets, and cloud compute. Quick Start Installation git clone git@github.com:huggingface/ml-intern.git cd ml-intern
uv sync
uv tool install -e . That's it. Now ml-intern works from any directory: ml-intern Create a .env file in the project root (or export these in your shell): ANTHROPIC_API_KEY= < your-anthropic-api-key > # if using anthropic models HF_TOKEN= < your-hugging-face-token > GITHUB_TOKEN= < github-personal-access-token > If no HF_TOKEN is set, the CLI will prompt you to paste one on first launch. To get a GITHUB_TOKEN follow the tutorial here . Usage Interactive mode (start a chat session): ml-intern Headless mode (single prompt, auto-approve): ml-intern " fine-tune llama on my dataset " Options: ml-intern --model anthropic/claude-opus-4-6 " your prompt " ml-intern --max-iterations 100 " your prompt " ml-intern --no-stream " your prompt " Architecture Component Overview ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                         User/CLI                            │
└────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────┬──────────┘
             │ Operations                          │ Events
             ↓ (user_input, exec_approval,         ↑
      submission_queue  interrupt, compact, ...)  event_queue
             │                                          │
             ↓                                          │
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│            submission_loop (agent_loop.py)         │  │
│  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │  │
│  │  1. Receive Operation from queue             │  │  │
│  │  2. Route to handler (run_agent/compact/...) │  │  │
│  └──────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │  │
│                      ↓                             │  │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────
title_es: Hugging Face lanza ML Intern para automatizar investigación y código
bajada: Hugging Face presentó ML Intern, un agente autónomo que investiga, escribe y deploya código ML de calidad usando el ecosistema de Hugging Face. La herramienta tiene acceso a documentación, papers, datasets y cómputo en la nube para automatizar tareas comunes de ML.
bajada_en: Hugging Face introduced ML Intern, an autonomous agent that researches, writes, and ships quality ML code using the Hugging Face ecosystem. The tool has access to docs, papers, datasets, and cloud compute.

title: Tesla discloses $2B AI hardware company acquisition in filing
summary: Article URL:https://electrek.co/2026/04/23/tesla-tsla-quietly-discloses-2-billion-ai-hardware-acquisition-10q/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47892765Points: 75# Comments: 47
title_es: Tesla adquiere empresa de hardware IA por $2 mil millones
bajada: Tesla divulgó en un filing la adquisición de una empresa de hardware IA por $2 mil millones. El movimiento refuerza la estrategia de Tesla de desarrollar capacidades propias de IA e infraestructura para sus operaciones.
bajada_en: Tesla disclosed a $2 billion acquisition of an AI hardware company in SEC filings. The move strengthens Tesla's strategy to develop in-house AI capabilities and infrastructure.

title: Show HN: A Karpathy-style LLM wiki your agents maintain (Markdown and Git)
summary:
I shipped a wiki layer for AI agents that uses markdown + git as the source of truth, with a bleve (BM25) + SQLite index on top. No vector or graph db yet.It runs locally in ~/.wuphf/wiki/ and you can git clone it out if you want to take your knowledge with you.The shape is the one Karpathy has been circling for a while: an LLM-native knowledge substrate that agents both read from and write into, so context compounds across sessions rather than getting re-pasted every morning. Most implementations of that idea land on Postgres, pgvector, Neo4j, Kafka, and a dashboard.I wanted to go back to the basics and see how far markdown + git could go before I added anything heavier.What it does:
-> Each agent gets a private notebook at agents/{slug}/notebook/.md, plus access to a shared team wiki at team/.-> Draft-to-wiki promotion flow. Notebook entries are reviewed (agent or human) and promoted to the canonical wiki with a back-link. A small state machine drives expiry and auto-archive.-> Per-entity fact log: append-only JSONL at team/entities/{kind}-{slug}.facts.jsonl. A synthesis worker rebuilds the entity brief every N facts. Commits land under a distinct "Pam the Archivist" git identity so provenance is visible in git log.-> [[Wikilinks]] with broken-link detection rendered in red.-> Daily lint cron for contradictions, stale entries, and broken wikilinks.-> /lookup slash command plus an MCP tool for cited retrieval. A heuristic classifier routes short lookups to BM25 and narrative queries to a cited-answer loop.Substrate choices:
Markdown for durability. The wiki outlives the runtime, and a user can walk away with every byte. Bleve for BM25. SQLite for structured metadata (facts, entities, edges, redirects, and supersedes). No vectors yet. The current benchmark (500 artifacts, 50 queries) clears 85% recall@20 on BM25 alone, which is the internal ship gate. sqlite-vec is the pre-committed fallback if a query class drops below that.Canonical IDs are first-class. Fact IDs a
title_es: LLM wiki mantenida por agentes IA usa Markdown y Git
bajada: Un developer compartió una herramienta open-source que permite a agentes IA mantener una wiki usando Markdown y Git como fuente de verdad. La solución implementa el patrón de sustrato de conocimiento para agentes que Andrej Karpathy ha promovido, sin depender de bases de datos complejas.
bajada_en: A developer shared an open-source tool enabling AI agents to maintain wikis using Markdown and Git as the source of truth. The solution implements the LLM-native knowledge substrate pattern Andrej Karpathy has advocated for, without complex databases.

title: Show HN: Browser Harness – Gives LLM freedom to complete any browser task
summary:
Hey HN,We got tired of browser frameworks restricting the LLM, so we removed the framework and gave the LLM maximum freedom to do whatever it's trained on. We gave the harness the ability to self correct and add new tools if the LLM wants (is pre-trained on) that.Our Browser Use library is tens of thousands of lines of deterministic heuristics wrapping Chrome (CDP websocket). Element extractors, click helpers, target managemenet (SUPER painful), watchdogs (crash handling, file downloads, alerts), cross origin iframes (if you want to click on an element you have to switch the target first, very anoying), etc.Watchdogs specifically are extremely painful but required. If Chrome triggers for example a native file popup the agent is just completely stuck. So the two solutions are to:
1. code those heuristics and edge cases away 1 by 1 and prevent them
2. give LLM a tool to handle the edge caseAs you can imagine - there are crazy amounts of heuristics like this so you eventually end up with A LOT of tools if you try to go for #2. So you have to make compromises and just code those heuristics away.BUT if the LLM just "knows" CDP well enough to switch the targets when it encounters a cross origin iframe, dismiss the alert when it appears, write its own click helpers, or upload function, you suddenly don't have to worry about any of those edge cases.Turns out LLMs know CDP pretty well these days. So we bitter pilled the harness. The concepts that should survive are:
- something that holds and keeps CDP websocket alive (deamon)
- extremely basic tools (helpers.py)
- skill.md that explains how to use itThe new paradigm? SKILL.md + a few python helpers that need to have the ability to change on the fly.One cool example:
We forgot to implement upload_file function. Then mid-task the agent wants to upload a file so it grepped helpers.py, saw nothing, wrote the function itself using raw DOM.setFileInputFiles (which we only noticed that later in a git diff). This was a relly magica
title_es: Browser Harness: libertad máxima para agentes LLM en navegadores
bajada: Browser Harness es un proyecto open-source que elimina restricciones de frameworks de browser para dar a los LLMs máxima libertad de acción. La herramienta permite a agentes auto-corregirse y agregar nuevas capacidades, reduciendo la necesidad de heurísticas predefinidas.
bajada_en: Browser Harness is an open-source project that removes browser framework restrictions to give LLMs maximum freedom. The tool enables agents to self-correct and add new capabilities, reducing predefined heuristics.

title: Open source memory layer so any AI agent can do what Claude.ai and ChatGPT do
summary: Article URL:https://alash3al.github.io/stash?_v01Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47897790Points: 86# Comments: 39
title_es: Capa de memoria open-source para agentes IA tipo Claude y ChatGPT
bajada: Se lanzó una capa de memoria open-source que permite a agentes IA implementar funcionalidades de memoria persistente similares a Claude.ai y ChatGPT. La herramienta democratiza capacidades que hasta ahora eran exclusivas de plataformas propietarias.
bajada_en: An open-source memory layer was released enabling AI agents to implement persistent memory features similar to Claude.ai and ChatGPT. The tool democratizes capabilities previously exclusive to proprietary platforms.

title: Tell HN: Claude 4.7 is ignoring stop hooks
title_es: Claude 4.7 ignora stop hooks, reportan usuarios
bajada: Usuarios de Anthropic reportaron que Claude 4.7 ignora stop hooks, características críticas que inyectan determinismo en workflows. El problema afecta la confiabilidad de automatizaciones que dependen de estas reglas de control.
bajada_en: Anthropic users reported that Claude 4.7 ignores stop hooks, critical features that inject determinism into workflows. The issue affects reliability of automations depending on these control rules.

title: 8 Gemini tips for organizing your space (and life)
summary: Black screen with illustrations including a laptop with document and email icons streaming out, a smiling person holding a phone and looking at a checklist, and a user activating Gemini Live
title_es: Google comparte tips para organización con Gemini
bajada: Google publicó consejos sobre cómo usar Gemini para organizar espacios y vida personal. La publicación es parte de iniciativas de marketing para incrementar adopción de Gemini entre usuarios generales.
bajada_en: Google published tips on using Gemini for personal organization and space management. The content is part of marketing initiatives to increase Gemini adoption among general users.

title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
summary: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Lidl’s owner, Schwarz Group. With the blessing of their governments, the companies intend to offer a sovereign alternative to enterprises in an AI landscape dominated by American players.
title_es: Cohere adquiere Aleph Alpha para crear alternativa soberana a EE.UU.
bajada: Cohere adquirió Aleph Alpha con respaldo de Schwarz Group (propietario de Lidl), creando una alternativa europea dominada por actores no estadounidenses. La fusión busca ofrecer opciones de IA soberana para empresas en un mercado dominado por jugadores americanos.
bajada_en: Cohere acquired Aleph Alpha with backing from Schwarz Group (Lidl's owner), creating a European alternative led by non-US players. The merger aims to offer sovereign AI options for enterprises in a market dominated by American companies.

title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
summary: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.
title_es: Anthropic prueba un mercado donde agentes de IA comercian entre sí
bajada: Anthropic creó un marketplace experimental donde agentes de IA actúan como compradores y vendedores, realizando transacciones reales con dinero real. El experimento demuestra capacidades de negociación autónoma y abre preguntas sobre economías dirigidas por agentes.
bajada_en: Anthropic created an experimental marketplace where AI agents act as both buyers and sellers, conducting real transactions with actual money. The experiment demonstrates autonomous negotiation capabilities and raises questions about agent-driven economies.

title: The AI Industry Is Discovering That the Public Hates It
summary: Article URL:https://newrepublic.com/article/209163/ai-industry-discovering-public-backlashComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47904568Points: 137# Comments: 153
title_es: La industria de IA descubre el rechazo creciente del público
bajada: Un análisis documenta cómo la opinión pública se está volviendo en contra de la IA, con preocupaciones sobre privacidad, empleo y ética. Este cambio de sentimiento podría influir en regulación y adopción empresarial.
bajada_en: Analysis shows how public opinion is increasingly turning against AI, with concerns about privacy, employment, and ethics. This sentiment shift could influence regulation and enterprise adoption.

title: GPT‑5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
summary: Article URL:https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-bio-bug-bounty/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47901734Points: 113# Comments: 88
title_es: OpenAI lanza programa de bug bounty para GPT-5.5 en biología
bajada: OpenAI creó un programa de recompensas de seguridad enfocado en riesgos biológicos de GPT-5.5. La iniciativa refleja creciente preocupación por capacidades de riesgo dual en modelos de IA avanzados.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched a security rewards program focused on biological risks from GPT-5.5. The initiative reflects growing concerns about dual-use capabilities in advanced AI models.

title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
summary: L.D. 307 would have imposed the country’s first statewide moratorium on new data centers — lasting, in this case, until November 1, 2027.
title_es: Gobernador de Maine rechaza prohibición de centros de datos
bajada: El gobernador de Maine vetó una moratoria estatal sobre nuevos centros de datos que habría sido la primera del país, protegiendo así proyectos de infraestructura para IA. La decisión refleja la tensión entre control regulatorio local y demanda de capacidad computacional.
bajada_en: Maine's governor vetoed a statewide moratorium on new data centers, which would have been the country's first, protecting AI infrastructure projects. The decision reflects the tension between local regulatory control and demand for computing capacity.

title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.
title_es: Sam Altman se disculpa con comunidad canadiense por fallo de seguridad
bajada: El CEO de OpenAI envió una carta disculpándose con los residentes de Tumbler Ridge, Canadá, por no alertar a la policía sobre un sospechoso en un tiroteo masivo. El incidente expone responsabilidades civiles de empresas tech en situaciones de seguridad pública.
bajada_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman sent a letter apologizing to residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, for failing to alert law enforcement about a mass shooting suspect. The incident highlights civil responsibilities of tech companies in public safety situations.

title: Lambda Calculus Benchmark for AI
summary: Article URL:https://victortaelin.github.io/lambench/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47900506Points: 121# Comments: 37
title_es: Lanzan benchmark de Lambda Calculus para evaluar IA
bajada: Nuevo benchmark basado en Lambda Calculus evalúa capacidades de razonamiento formal en modelos de IA. La herramienta proporciona métrica específica para programadores que trabajan con IA en tareas lógicas complejas.
bajada_en: New Lambda Calculus-based benchmark evaluates formal reasoning capabilities in AI models. The tool provides a specific metric for developers working with AI on complex logical tasks.

title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
summary: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globally.
title_es: Tokio consolidada como destino tech más importante de 2026
bajada: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 posiciona la ciudad como hub tecnológico global con cuatro dominios especializados y demostraciones en vivo. El evento refleja el crecimiento de ecosistemas tech fuera de Silicon Valley.
bajada_en: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 positions the city as a global tech hub with four specialized domains and live demonstrations. The event reflects the growth of tech ecosystems outside Silicon Valley.
